# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "serverName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL logical server."
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL Database."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Deployment location."
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL administrator username."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL administrator password."
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "S0",
        "S1",
        "S2",
        "GP_S_Gen5_1",
        "GP_S_Gen5_2",
        "GP_S_Gen5_4",
        "HS_Gen5_2"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database SKU name."
      }
    },
    "skuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "Standard",
        "GeneralPurpose",
        "Hyperscale"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database SKU tier."
      }
    },
    "maxSizeBytes": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2147483648",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Max database size in bytes."
      }
    },
    "collation": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database collation."
      }
    },
    "publicNetworkAccess": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Enabled",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Enabled",
        "Disabled"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable/disable public network access on the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "minimalTlsVersion": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "1.2",
      "allowedValues": [
        "1.0",
        "1.1",
        "1.2"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Minimal TLS version for the SQL server."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "serverApiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
    "databaseApiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('serverApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('serverName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "[parameters('publicNetworkAccess')]",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "[parameters('minimalTlsVersion')]",
        "version": "12.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('databaseApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('skuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('skuTier')]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "collation": "[parameters('collation')]",
        "maxSizeBytes": "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]",
        "zoneRedundant": false,
        "readScale": "Disabled",
        "requestedBackupStorageRedundancy": "Local"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('serverName')]"
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('databaseName')]"
    },
    "fullyQualifiedDomainName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName')), variables('serverApiVersion')).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    }
  }
}
